body:
Coalition overview

The Park County Schools Coalition is working to keep Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley elementaries open and stop the proposed consolidation.

  • Goal: defeat consolidation at the November 10 board vote
  • Reach: District 3 families and ranch neighbors
  • Tools: phone tree, yard signs, op-ed, public testimony
title: Coalition overview

body:
Meeting notes

Notes from the coalition meeting at the community hall.

  • Confirmed yard sign order and distribution route
  • Maria to lead Sage Creek family calls
  • Charles to request enrollment and busing cost data from the district
title: Meeting notes — December

body:
Talking points

Key points for volunteers giving public comment at the hearing.

  • Longer bus rides for young children
  • Higher costs once busing and facilities are counted
  • Small classes get better results for rural kids
title: Talking points
